message:
fix(security): update lru to 0.16 and increase daemon test timeout

Security:
- Update lru dependency from 0.12 to 0.16 (fixes RUSTSEC-2026-0002)
- Resolves unsound `IterMut` violation of Stacked Borrows

Test stability:
- Increase daemon verbose mode test timeout from 10s to 30s
- Handles parallel test execution where system is under load

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
